tasks.subject: Task 0: Create ProcurementPage wrapper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New page at `/procurement` with Purchasing and Receiving subtabs.

**Files:**
- Create: `client/src/pages/procurement/index.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `/procurement` redirects to `/procurement/purchasing`
- [ ] `/procurement/purchasing` renders SuppliersTab content
- [ ] `/procurement/receiving` renders Receiving content
- [ ] Tab strip shows correct active tab
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes

**Verify:** `pnpm typecheck` → exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["client/src/pages/procurement/index.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/procurement redirects to /procurement/purchasing", "/procurement/purchasing renders SuppliersTab", "/procurement/receiving renders Receiving", "pnpm typecheck passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Create OperationsPage wrapper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New page at `/operations` with Production and Equipment subtabs.

**Files:**
- Create: `client/src/pages/operations/index.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `/operations` redirects to `/operations/production`
- [ ] `/operations/production` renders Production content
- [ ] `/operations/equipment` renders EquipmentPage content

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes

**Verify:** `pnpm typecheck` → exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["client/src/pages/operations/index.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/operations redirects to /operations/production", "/operations/production renders Production", "/operations/equipment renders EquipmentPage", "pnpm typecheck passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Fix Equipment internal routing for /operations/equipment prefix
tasks.description:
**Goal:** EquipmentPage and detail page update all hardcoded `/equipment` paths to `/operations/equipment`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `client/src/pages/equipment/index.tsx` (lines 93, 123-125, 243)
- Modify: `client/src/pages/equipment/detail.tsx` (lines 76, 105)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Equipment subtab clicks navigate to `/operations/equipment/:tab`
- [ ] View button links to `/operations/equipment/:id`
- [ ] Detail page back link goes to `/operations/equipment`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes

**Verify:** `pnpm typecheck` → exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["client/src/pages/equipment/index.tsx", "client/src/pages/equipment/detail.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Equipment subtabs navigate to /operations/equipment/:tab", "View button links to /operations/equipment/:id", "Back link goes to /operations/equipment", "pnpm typecheck passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add OOS subtab to QualityPage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** QualityPage gains a 5th subtab "OOS" rendering OosInvestigations at `/quality/oos`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `client/src/pages/quality/index.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Quality tab strip shows: Labeling · SOPs · Complaints · Returns · OOS
- [ ] `/quality/oos` renders OosInvestigations content
- [ ] Other Quality subtabs unchanged
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes

**Verify:** `pnpm typecheck` → exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["client/src/pages/quality/index.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Quality shows 5 subtabs including OOS", "/quality/oos renders OosInvestigations", "pnpm typecheck passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Wire App.tsx — new nav, routes, redirects, Transactions header
tasks.description:
**Goal:** App.tsx updated with 6-tab navItems, new routes, redirect handlers for old paths, and Transactions demoted to a header link.

**Files:**
- Modify: `client/src/App.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Nav shows: Dashboard · Supply Chain · Inventory · Procurement · Operations · Quality
- [ ] Transactions appears in header (ADMIN only)
- [ ] Old routes redirect correctly
- [ ] All new routes render their components
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes

**Verify:** `pnpm typecheck` → exit 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["client/src/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Nav shows 6 tabs", "Transactions in header for ADMIN", "Old routes redirect", "pnpm typecheck passes"]}
```
